name: The Blunderbuss
short_description: Roam the streets of Santo Domingo, in this open world third person shooter. Follow the story of Eduardo as he unveils a plot that might doom the entire city. Avenge your family and defend their honor. The current version is in early access and contains a limited version of the story.
detailed_description:
Roam the streets of Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, in this open world third person shooter. Follow the story of Eduardo as he unveils a plot that might doom the entire city. Avenge your family and defend their honor.
The current version is in early access and contains a limited version of the story.
about_the_game:
Roam the streets of Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, in this open world third person shooter. Follow the story of Eduardo as he unveils a plot that might doom the entire city. Avenge your family and defend their honor.
The current version is in early access and contains a limited version of the story.
supported_languages:
Spanish - Latin America*
*languages with full audio support
